review_text: Months went by with no meaningful progress. Attorney Brooks always had a reason for the delays but it got old fast. Eventually things worked out but the timeline was unacceptable.
owner_response: Timelines in legal matters are often outside our direct control, but we hear your frustration and appreciate you sharing it.

review_text: The legal work was fine but this law office overcharged and was slow to respond to emails. I've worked with other attorneys who were more proactive. Wouldn't use them again.

Ms. Chen handled my case but the billing was confusing and I felt overcharged for routine phone calls. The outcome was acceptable but I left feeling like I was nickel-and-dimed throughout the process.
Had a frustrating experience with their team. The attorney seemed competent but communication was poor. I often had to chase them down for updates. Took much longer than expected.
I gave their team two stars because while they were professional, the strategy they took on my case felt wrong in hindsight. Not sure I'd trust them with anything complex again.
Ms. Thompson got the job done but barely. I had to repeat myself multiple times and felt like I wasn't a priority. For the money I paid I expected more attentiveness.
owner_response: Thank you for taking the time to share this. Client communication is something we continuously work to improve.

review_text: I felt dismissed during consultations with Ms. Huang. My questions were answered quickly without much depth. The case resolved okay but I never felt confident in the representation.
owner_response: We're sorry to hear you felt this way. We strive to make every client feel heard and supported throughout their matter.

review_text: The result of my case was not what Ms. Chen led me to expect. I understand outcomes aren't guaranteed but the disconnect between early expectations and reality was significant.
The attorney handling my divorce case through their team was technically skilled but emotionally cold. Going through a divorce is already devastating — I needed more compassion than I got.
I got what I hired this law office for but the process was bumpier than it needed to be. A few miscommunications along the way made things stressful. Outcome was fine.
Average experience. Ms. Huang was thorough but the billing felt a bit opaque. I'm not sure every hour billed was truly necessary. Would want more clarity next time.
Three stars feels right. Attorney Brooks was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
Communication was hit or miss with this law office. When I could get someone on the phone they were helpful, but getting to that point sometimes took longer than it should. Results were acceptable.
I hired Attorney Brooks for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
Solid but not spectacular. Attorney Walsh handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
Ms. Huang did okay work on my case. Nothing exceptional but nothing terrible either. Communication was average and the outcome was roughly what I expected. Decent but not memorable.
this law office handled my matter adequately. The attorney was knowledgeable but seemed stretched thin between cases. Not bad, not great — right in the middle.
The good: Mr. Kim clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
owner_response: We appreciate the honest feedback. We are actively working on improving our response times for all client communications.

review_text: Mixed experience with this law office. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
owner_response: Thank you for sharing a balanced perspective. We're committed to providing consistent quality across our entire team.

review_text: I hired Mr. Patel for a business contract dispute. The representation was competent but the strategy felt conservative. We settled, which was probably the right call, but I left wanting more.
